stemHtml: On a cold winter day with OAT of -8°C you are being radar vectored. What should apply during this procedure?

options.a: You expect to be within the coverage of a navigation aid to cross-check your position. The given altitude by ATC is temperature corrected.
options.b: You do NOT expect to be within the coverage of any navigation aid. The given altitude by ATC is temperature corrected.
options.c: You expect to be within the coverage of a navigation aid to cross-check your position. The given altitude by ATC is NOT temperature corrected.
options.d: You do NOT expect to be within the coverage of any navigation aid. The given altitude by ATC is NOT temperature corrected.
